name: DNS Health Monitoring
description: Scheduled DNS health monitoring that checks resolution for critical domains, validates response times, and detects DNS poisoning or hijacking. Failed resolutions or anomalous responses trigger AI analysis to assess the scope of impact, followed by an incident ticket and multi-channel alerting. Healthy results are logged for compliance.
author: T1 Agentics

required_integrations.name: DNS Monitor
required_integrations.reason: Perform DNS resolution checks and response time measurement for critical domains

required_integrations.name: Jira
required_integrations.reason: Create incident tickets for DNS resolution failures or anomalies

required_integrations.name: Slack
required_integrations.reason: Alert the infrastructure team of DNS health issues

config.description: Runs every 15 minutes to perform DNS resolution checks against all critical domains

config.query: SELECT domain, expected_ip, record_type, max_response_ms FROM dns_monitors WHERE active = true ORDER BY priority ASC
config.description: Retrieve the list of critical domains to check along with their expected resolution values
Iterate over each critical domain and perform DNS resolution check comparing against expected values
Check if any DNS resolution checks returned failures, timeouts, or unexpected responses

config.additional_instructions: Assess the impact of DNS failures or anomalies. Determine if this indicates DNS poisoning, upstream resolver issues, or configuration drift. Provide severity assessment and recommended remediation steps.
config.description: AI-powered analysis of DNS anomalies to determine root cause and impact scope

parameters.summary: DNS Resolution Issue — {{loop_1.dns_results | filter(status != 'ok') | length}} domain(s) affected

config.description: Create an incident ticket for the DNS resolution failures with AI-powered impact analysis
Send urgent Slack notification about DNS resolution failures to the infrastructure team

parameters.note: DNS health check completed at {{trigger_1.timestamp}}. All {{code_1.domains.length}} critical domains resolving correctly.

config.description: Log that all DNS resolution checks passed successfully
